name: HubSpot
description: HubSpot is an all-in-one CRM platform for marketing, sales, and customer service. Manage contacts, companies, deals, tickets, and automate workflows through a comprehensive REST API.

capabilities.name: search_contacts
capabilities.description: Search for contacts by email, name, phone, or custom properties.

capabilities.name: create_contact
capabilities.description: Create a new contact with properties like email, name, and company.

capabilities.name: manage_deals
capabilities.description: Create, update, or list deals in the sales pipeline.

capabilities.name: list_companies
capabilities.description: List and search companies with filtering and property selection.

capabilities.name: create_engagement
capabilities.description: Log a note, email, call, or meeting as an engagement on a contact or deal.

capabilities.name: manage_tickets
capabilities.description: Create and manage support tickets in the service hub.
